title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Axe India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Axe India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Digital Marketing Manager with drive and ambition, Axe India in Noida is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Axe India:
Axe India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Axe India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
